title: BEM-865 codex step names
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_codex_steps')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i,l in enumerate(lines,1):
    if l.strip().startswith('- name:') or 'uses: actions/checkout' in l:
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in l.strip())[:90]
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# codex step line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + l + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_CODEX_STEP_NAMES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-865 codex step names\nCount: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('codex step names listed: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
